data.title: Asset management firm F/m Investments has applied to tokenize $6 billion in Treasury bond ETFs.
data.description: F/m Investments has announced that it has applied to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission for an exemption to allow ownership of approximately $6 billion in shares of its flagship Treasury ETF, the F/m US Treasury 3 Month Bill ETF (TBIL), to be recorded on a permissioned blockchain. The asset management firm, which currently manages $18 billion in assets, stated that this application marks the first time an ETF issuer has sought a regulatory exemption to tokenize its Registered Investment Company (CUSIP) shares. Tokenized TBIL shares will retain their existing CUSIP numbers and will have the same rights, fees, voting rights, and economic terms as the current shares. If approved, the ETF will be able to support both traditional brokerage channels and digital-native platforms through a single share class.

data.title: North Korean hackers attacked AI and encryption companies through fake interviews, affecting over 3,100 IP addresses.
data.description: The North Korean hacking group PurpleBravo launched a massive fake recruitment campaign, attacking over 3,100 IP addresses associated with companies in the AI, cryptocurrency, and financial services sectors. Attackers impersonated recruiters or developers on platforms like LinkedIn, luring job seekers to perform technical interview tasks on company devices. These tasks included reviewing code or cloning malicious Git repositories to deploy PylangGhost and GolangGhost remote access trojans to steal browser credentials. The operation has affected 20 organizations in South Asia, North America, and Europe. Research indicates the group used forged Ukrainian identities as a cover and weaponized Microsoft Visual Studio Code to implant backdoors. The group is also detected using Astrill VPN and C2 servers located in China to conceal its activities, which overlap with the activities of the Contagious Interview cluster.

data.title: Gate founder Dr. Han: Gate values ​​long-term employee development and implements a high-reward incentive mechanism for high-effort employees.
data.description: On January 22nd, Gate founder and CEO Dr. Han participated in an AMA (Ask Me Anything), sharing industry insights and the platform's New Year outlook, while also maintaining close interaction with the community. Dr. Han stated that the Web3 industry differs from traditional industries; its work methods and pace cannot be simply measured by conventional job models. As a platform in a high-growth phase, Gate's rapid business development requires the participation of outstanding talent with professional skills and a willingness to grow. Gate adheres to the principle of "high input, high return," providing employees with rewards and incentives commensurate with their contributions. Simultaneously, it helps teams accumulate experience, broaden their horizons, and transform daily work experience into skills that support long-term personal development, while also working alongside partners who share this growth philosophy. Looking towards 2026, Gate has clearly stated its long-term direction of building a "best employer brand" and will focus its resources on three specific initiatives: optimizing career development and learning systems to provide employees with clear growth paths and opportunities for skill enhancement; continuously improving employee experience and welfare support so that teams feel cared for in terms of daily work and well-being; and establishing a more transparent and fair evaluation and incentive mechanism to create a positive feedback loop between contribution and reward. Dr. Han stated that he hopes Gate can become a platform where employees are willing to develop long-term, where they can see a clear career path, gain continuous learning and growth opportunities, and feel the company's respect and recognition of their personal value.

data.title: Pundi AI and Waves AI have partnered to transform culture into verifiable intelligence.
data.description: Pundi AI announced a collaboration with intelligent content oracle Waves AI to transform Web3 culture, sentiment, and narratives into verifiable on-chain intelligent data. Waves AI captures real-time community sentiment and cultural dynamics, while Pundi AI provides the infrastructure to transform this data into trusted, verifiable, and community-co-created on-chain assets, pioneering a new Web3 model where "culture is on-chain data." Through this collaboration, cultural signals such as sentiment, trends, and narratives will be labeled as auditable on-chain datasets, usable by AI agents, protocols, and applications, transforming abstract emotions into learnable intelligent information. Pundi AI's "tag-to-earn" model allows the community to participate in data labeling and earn rewards, while Waves AI gains high-quality training data. Together, they are driving the integration of AI and culture, providing new possibilities for on-chain AI agents in areas such as trading, marketing, and governance, and helping to build an AI-native Web3 future.

data.title: A whale used a cyclical lending mechanism to purchase 9,439 XAUT tokens, and currently has a floating profit of $3.45 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale (0x852...230e) purchased 9439 XAUTs for 42.13 million USDe in the past 25 days through a revolving lending mechanism, at a purchase price of $4463. This address currently has a floating profit of $3.45 million.

data.title: Gate founder Dr. Han: We are using AI as an accelerator to create a "super gateway" for Web3 to integrate into the real world.
data.description: According to official sources, Gate held an AMA on its official Chinese X channel on January 22nd. Founder and CEO Dr. Han was the keynote speaker, sharing his core judgments on the next stage of industry evolution. Dr. Han pointed out that the so-called Intelligent Web3 is not simply about adding AI functions, but rather about transforming complex processes such as cross-chain, wallets, gas, and risk control into "usability" through systematic and automated means, making Web3 a truly controllable, predictable, and long-term usable infrastructure. Dr. Han further stated that the essence of intelligence lies in reducing users' reliance on subjective judgment, forming systematic capabilities in risk warning, transaction execution, and asset management, and driving Web3 from a short-term trading tool to a long-term entry point covering asset management, payments, and real-world scenarios. He also emphasized that the key to future competition in Web3 lies in continuous and stable operational capabilities, rather than single-point innovation. At the product level, Gate has launched the AI-powered market analysis tool GateAI, which is fully integrated into the Gate App. This tool helps users understand market changes more efficiently by structurally analyzing market elements, risk ranges, and operational paths. The official statement indicates that GateAI will gradually evolve into a comprehensive intelligent assistant covering information understanding, risk perception, and transaction collaboration, becoming an important part of its Intelligent Web3 strategy.

data.title: RALPH developers dumped $300,000 worth of tokens, causing the price to drop by 80%.
data.description: According to Bubblemaps, the developers of the RALPH token just sold $300,000 worth of tokens, causing the price to drop by 80%. Their holding cluster still holds 3% of the token supply.

data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks generally rose in pre-market trading in the US, with BMNR up 3.93%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, pre-market performance of crypto stocks in the US market was mixed. Strategy (MSTR) rose 2.23%, Robinhood (HOOD) rose 0.13%, Sharplink Gaming (SBET) rose 0.25%, BitMine (BMNR) rose 3.93%, and Circle (CRCL) fell 0.08%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.
